issues.description: Missing condition for optional cost: 'You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand' must be represented as a condition. The action should only execute if this condition is met.
excludeSelf is not a valid filter property for PlayFromHand. The exclusion of [Trafalgar Law] should use 'excludeName' or similar property, not excludeSelf.
Filter should explicitly exclude 'Trafalgar Law' by name since the card text says 'other than [Trafalgar Law]'. Current implementation unclear if this is handled.
